locations.novigrad: Novigrad – A bustling city of merchants, bards, and political intrigue where the dispute between Sapkowski and the Guild first erupted.
locations.witcher_guild_hall: Witcher Guild Hall – A hidden place where witchers gather to take on contracts and discuss their work.

items.spirit_soul: Spirit Soul – A fragment of the ancient spirit's essence, corrupted by greed.
items.golden_contract: Golden Contract – A contract signed by both parties, outlining their agreement over the stories.

characters.mysterious_client: Mysterious Client – A shadowy figure who hires the witcher to investigate the disappearances.
characters.witcher_master: Witcher Master – The leader of the witcher guild who oversees the investigation.

action_text.unlock-path: I unlock a new path from ${from} to ${to} with ${item}.
